props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: textBgColor
props.description: Sets the component's color scheme to one of CoreUI's themed colors, ensuring the text color contrast adheres to the WCAG 4.5:1 contrast ratio standard for accessibility.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Sets the text color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.
